Billing Portal › displays current plan information

Billing Portal › displays invoice history when available
Analytics Dashboard › displays key metrics

Analytics Dashboard › displays job performance table
Community Forums › displays forum categories
Skills Gap Analysis › shows skills gap for job
Mentor dashboard fetches AiConcierge suggestions on load
Mentor setup save shows success notification

Mentorship Features › mentor can view availability calendar
Mentorship Features › member can view session history
Mentorship Features › member can submit session feedback
Mentorship Features › mentor can view earnings
Mentorship Circles › displays available circles
Mentorship Circles › can join a circle

Course Enrolment › displays user enrolments

company schedule flow and resume preview

Stripe Subscription Flow › billing page shows canceled message after Stripe redirect
